name: Loui's
teaser: Buddy's gets the glory, but many — including me — think this is actually the best. The punch in the gut you didn't know you had a fetish for.
review: Buddy's gets the glory, but this less refined version of Detroit-style is what many — including me — think is actually the best. It's greasier and the sauce ain't as good as Buddy's (oh, it's REAL canned), but it's the punch in the gut you didn't know you had a fetish for.
headsUp: Greasier and more rustic than Buddy's. That is the point.
update: Still the local's choice. The greasy, punchy original.
address: 23141 Dequindre Rd, Hazel Park, MI 48030, USA
hours: Monday: Closed · Tuesday: Closed · Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Thursday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Saturday: 12:00 – 10:00 PM · Sunday: 12:00 – 9:00 PM
